message:
✨ Default to EPG guide view + use mapped EPG IDs for programme lookup

- Guide view is now the default (was channel list)
- EPG lookups use mapped channel ID from epg_mappings table, falling back to tvgId
- Loads all mappings on startup into _epgMappings lookup map
- Guide row programmes use _getEpgId() helper for correct EPG data

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
